blended.narrative: Montana Snowbowl is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,669 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.6" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 16.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 6" over the past week. Current depth: 75".
